vulnerabilities.title: dojox vulnerable to unescaped string injection
vulnerabilities.description: In Dojo Toolkit before 1.14.0, there is unescaped string injection in dojox/Grid/DataGrid.

vulnerabilities.title: Prototype Pollution in Dojox
XSS in dojox due to insufficient escape in dojox.xmpp.util.xmlEncode
vulnerabilities.description:
### Impact
_What kind of vulnerability is it? Who is impacted?_

Potential XSS vulnerability for users of `dojox/xmpp` and `dojox/dtl`.

### Patches
_Has the problem been patched? What versions should users upgrade to?_

Yes, patches are available for the 1.11 through 1.16 versions. Users should upgrade to one of these versions of Dojo:

* 1.16.1
* 1.15.2
* 1.14.5
* 1.13.6
* 1.12.7
* 1.11.9

Users of Dojo 1.10.x and earlier should review this change and determine if it impacts them, and backport
